title: Décor Double Wall Stainless Steel Travel Mug - Keeps 6 Hours Hot - 12 Hours Cold - Car Cup Holder Compatible - Easy Drinking Access with a Slide Cap Lid - 600ml Rose Gold.
features: KEEPS DRINKS HOT FOR 6 HOURS: The Decor 600ml Travel Mug keeps your drinks hot for 6 hours and cold for 12 hours. Made with vacuum insulated stainless steel for superior thermal performance and designed to keep your coffee, tea, hot chocolate, herbal teas etc with that perfect fresh made taste.

STYLE BLENDED WITH PERFORMANCE- Our 600ml Travel Mug has a large 600ml capacity but it is also the convenient size for car cup holders, desks and a great on the go travel mug. The trend metallic black is a great accessory to any outfit or occasion. Also available in Metallic Black and Matte Black.
EASY TO OPEN/CLOSE SLIDER LID MECHANISM - an easy to use locking lid function . Our Travel Mug range is dual purpose for hot and cold use, making this the ideal all day re-usable drinking option.

ECO-FRIENDLY TRAVEL MUG: At Décor we create high quality, reusable and durable mugs and flasks that are designed to last offering our customers a cost-saving & environmentally friendly drinking solutions that reduce single use cups and mugs

DÉCOR have over 60 years market experience of providing leading food storage, hydration and lunch solutions that are not only functional, exceptional value for money but also at the heart of our consumers needs.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Coffee, Herbal Tea, Hot Water, Tea, Water
